title: EMERGENCY WOOD LOT - 211info
text: NEIGHBORS TOGETHER WOODLOT EMERGENCY WOOD LOT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides up to one cord of firewood. Assistance is granted only once per season and is on a first come, first serve basis. 3304 Alder Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 963-9126 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 963-9126 Appointments Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: No standard hours Services: Discounted Heating Fuel If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
